sync.description: Sync VEIL vocabulary rules to AI tool configuration files.
sync.targets_format_error: Warning: targets.json format is invalid. Expected an array of path strings.
sync.no_targets:
No sync targets registered. Register first:
  python shared/runtime/veil-sync.py --add <path>
sync.no_rules: No rules to sync. Check SQLite canonical.
sync.protected_target_path: Error: sync targets under this repo's {root}/ directory are not allowed: {path}
sync.purge_help: Also remove the VEIL block from the target file when unregistering.
sync.runtime_instruction:
VEIL background workflow:
- At the end of a substantive task or conversation boundary, run the installed `veil-capture` workflow automatically once; do not ask the user to start it.
- If no vocabulary decision is required, remain silent about VEIL.
- If exceptions exist, ask one combined question for all of them and write only accepted mappings.

status.description: Show VEIL status and setup diagnostics.
status.check_help: Run delivery diagnostics; required stale, missing, or erroneous members fail the check.

lint.description: Check text against VEIL vocabulary rules.
lint.clean: CLEAN: No registered source terms found in the text.
lint.conflict_warning: Warning: normalized key conflict [{normalized}] selected {original} -> {preferred} ({source_file}), ignored {ignored}
lint.usage_error: Usage error: specify one of <file>, --stdin, or --text.
lint.source_error: ERROR: cannot load VEIL rules from {source_type}:{source_label} ({reason})

normalize.description: Normalize candidate terms and show integration candidates against VEIL rules.
normalize.text_help: Pass candidate terms as a newline-separated string.
normalize.conflict_warning: Warning: normalized key conflict [{normalized}] selected {original} -> {preferred} ({source_file}), ignored {ignored}
normalize.usage_error: Usage error: specify one of <file>, --stdin, or --text.
normalize.source_error: ERROR: cannot load reference rules from {label} ({reason})

db.import_seed_help: Import JSON seed rules into SQLite.
db.upsert_rule_help: Add or update 1 rule in SQLite canonical.
db.upsert_batch_help: Add or update accepted rules from validated JSON.
db.upsert_batch_file_help: UTF-8 JSON file containing contract_version and a rules array.
db.level_help: Profile level. Default: required. Allowed: required, recommended, observe.
db.import_rules_confirm: WARNING: this import replaces all existing rules in {db}. Press Enter to continue, Ctrl-C to abort.
db.export_mirror_help: Generate markdown mirror from SQLite canonical.
db.export_rules_dir_help: Mirror export target rules directory. Default: ~/.veil/rules
db.export_html_path_help: Output path for HTML file. Default: ~/.veil/veil.html

store.db_unreadable: DB file is unreadable or not a valid SQLite database.
store.seed_unreadable: Seed file is unreadable or not valid JSON.
store.seed_entry_ignored: Seed entry could not be parsed - skipped.
store.rule_parse_ignored: Rule line could not be parsed — skipped.
store.empty_original_or_preferred: original or preferred is empty — skipped.
store.protected_output_path: Protected output path. Do not generate VEIL files under this repo's common/ or archive/ directories.
store.invalid_profile_level: Invalid profile level. Use required, recommended, or observe.
store.batch_validation_failed: Batch validation failed before any rule was written.
store.batch_duplicate_term: The batch contains the same normalized term more than once.
store.batch_write_failed: Atomic batch write failed; no rule from the batch was committed.

html.title: VEIL - Vocabulary Rules
html.instruction: Normal task-close review runs in the installed Skill. This page is a recovery surface: copy the complete text for semantic AI review, or optionally run the local diagnostic preview. Registered rules below can be reviewed or changed.
html.capture_description: Paste text and copy one complete AI review request. The optional local preview is regex-based and may miss or misclassify decisions.
html.capture_placeholder: Paste the exact text to review...
html.capture_exceptions_prompt_header: Run the installed VEIL capture workflow on this exact text.
html.capture_exceptions_prompt_footer: Use semantic frames contract v2 and a separate critic pass. Do not treat the HTML preview as semantic evidence or write before acceptance.
html.capture_empty: Paste text to copy an AI review request or run the optional preview.
html.capture_none: The local preview found no possible exception. This does not complete semantic AI review.
html.capture_note: Recovery only: the local preview is not proof that the conversation was understood. Send the complete text to AI before any write.
html.capture_ready: The local preview found possible review items. Send the complete text to AI before any write.
html.capture_loaded: '{term}' came from the diagnostic preview. Verify it with AI before saving.
html.capture_footer: The local preview is diagnostic only; semantic AI review remains authoritative for the normal flow.
html.capture_prompt_header: Run the installed VEIL capture workflow on the exact text below. Use evidence-backed semantic decision frames (contract v2) and a separate critic pass. Do not use the HTML regex preview as semantic proof. Keep automatic outcomes silent and ask at most one combined question for unresolved durable decisions.
html.capture_prompt_footer: Use exact source evidence. Preserve supplied preferred forms, and do not write any rule until the user has accepted the combined decision.
html.register_missing: Term and preferred form are required.
html.copy_manual: Clipboard access is unavailable. Copy this text manually:
html.copy_failed: Copy failed. Copy the text manually from the prompt.
html.delete_instruction_header: Run these commands to delete this rule:
html.register_instruction_header: Run these commands to register this rule:
html.register_prompt_header: Register this VEIL rule in the current repository:
html.register_prompt_footer: Update the SQLite canonical, then regenerate the mirror and veil.html.

export.base_manifest_help: Manifest of base profile pack. When specified, uses its directory as source.
export.intended_use_help: Intended use. Default: AI-assisted technical writing terminology guardrail
